response.justification: The candidate demonstrates well over the required 6 years of fullstack experience with strong, directly relevant work: TypeScript/Node.js/React product development, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker/Kubernetes deployments, and recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators. A sustained testing focus (TDD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks and assertion libraries, taught testing courses) matches the quality expectations of the role. Gaps are modest: no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience, and the listed testing tools (Vitest/Jest/Playwright) are not named, though the underlying expertise clearly transfers.
strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB product work
Hands-on AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks)
Deep testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored test runners, taught testing workshops
concerns: No stated Nest.js experience, a core framework in the primary stack
No Kotlin exposure; Java experience appears dated and secondary
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly listed despite strong general testing background

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and Kotlin from primary/secondary stack
